lakera.description: Screen tool outputs for prompt injection via Lakera Guard API. Off by default: sends up to 30k chars of tool output to api.lakera.ai — opt in deliberately with `/guard lakera on`.

langfuse.description: Trace tool executions to Langfuse for observability and evaluation. Off by default: telemetry to an external service — opt in with `/guard langfuse on`.

destructive.description: Block destructive commands (git reset --hard, rm -rf, DROP TABLE, etc.)

secrets.description: Block Write/Edit that leaks secrets (API keys, private keys, tokens) or targets credential files (.env, *.pem, id_rsa, database.ini)

audit.description: Auto-run pip-audit after uv add/sync/lock/pip install — reports dependency CVEs (informational, non-blocking)
